attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SABA.AP_BANK_ACCOUNT_KEY,
COALESCE(NABB.AP_BANK_BRANCH_KEY,-999) AS AP_BANK_BRANCH_KEY,
SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
COALESCE(SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') as BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
COALESCE(SMOABA.ACCOUNT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') as CISCO_BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLAG,
SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID as SK_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD,
SMOABA.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
SMOABA.SS_TABLE_CD
FROM 
(	/* Removed as per SJProd Retirement Q1FY13 */
	/* SELECT		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
				BANK_BRANCH_ID,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				'INT/EXT' AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			   ACTION_CODE
	FROM 
		$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS_ALL 
	WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	UNION ALL */
	SELECT 
			A.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
			A.BANK_BRANCH_ID,
			A.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
			A.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
			A.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
			A.GLOBAL_NAME,
			A.ACCOUNT_TYPE,
			A.SS_TABLE_CD,
			A.ACTION_CODE
	FROM                  
	(
		SELECT 
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
				BANK_BRANCH_ID,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				 ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				 'INTERNAL' AS SS_TABLE_CD,
				 ACTION_CODE
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_CE_BANK_ACCOUNTS 
		WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
						BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
						COALESCE(BRANCH_ID,-999) AS BANK_BRANCH_ID,
						BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
						BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
						EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID AS BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
						GLOBAL_NAME,
						CASE WHEN BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE ='BANK' THEN 'EXTERNAL'
							 WHEN BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE<>'BANK' THEN 'SUPPLIER'
						END ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				 'EXT/SUP' AS SS_TABLE_CD,
				 ACTION_CODE
		FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS   
		WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
						BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
						COALESCE(BRANCH_ID,-999) AS BANK_BRANCH_ID,
						BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
						BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
						EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID AS BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
						GLOBAL_NAME,
						CASE WHEN BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE ='BANK' THEN 'EXTERNAL'
							 WHEN BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE<>'BANK' THEN 'SUPPLIER'
						END ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				 'EXT/SUP' AS SS_TABLE_CD,
				 ACTION_CODE
		FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS
	)A
	/*
	Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
				BANK_BRANCH_ID,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				'INT/EXT' AS SS_TABLE_CD,
				ACTION_CODE
	FROM    $$STGDB.ST_OM_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS
	*/
	/*Added as part of SJPROD Retirement */
	UNION ALL
	SELECT		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
				COALESCE(BANK_BRANCH_ID,-999) AS BANK_BRANCH_ID,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION AS ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				'INT/EXT' AS SS_TABLE_CD,
			   ACTION_CODE
	FROM 
		$$STGDB.ST_CG1_CE_BANK_ACCOUNTS
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
				BANK_BRANCH_ID,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
				BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
				GLOBAL_NAME,
				ACCOUNT_TYPE,
				SS_TABLE_CD,
				ACTION_CODE
	FROM    $$EXCEPDB.EX_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS
)SMOABA
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOABA.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_BANK_ACCOUNT SABA
         ON (SABA.SK_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID_INT=SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID 
		 AND SABA.SS_TABLE_CD=SMOABA.SS_TABLE_CD
		 AND SABA.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AP_BANK_BRANCH NABB
        ON (NABB.SK_BANK_BRANCH_ID_INT=SMOABA.BANK_BRANCH_ID
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NABB.SS_CD)

SELECT 
RANK () OVER ( ORDER BY SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,SMOABA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,SMOABA.SS_TABLE_CD ) + MAX_VAL AP_BANK_ACCOUNT_KEY,
SMOABA.SS_TABLE_CD,
SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, 
SMOABA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM 
(	SELECT 
	STMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, 
	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ,
	STMOABA.SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM	 
		(	/* removed as part of sjprod retirement 
		SELECT 	BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,'INT/EXT' SS_TABLE_CD 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS_ALL 
			WHERE	GLOBAL_NAME='US' */
			/*
			Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
			
			UNION	ALL
			SELECT 	BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,'INT/EXT' SS_TABLE_CD 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_OM_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS
			UNION ALL		
			*/
	
			SELECT 	BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,'INTERNAL' AS SS_TABLE_CD
			FROM   	$$STGDB.ST_MF_CE_BANK_ACCOUNTS 
			WHERE 	GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
			UNION ALL
			SELECT  EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID AS BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,'EXT/SUP' AS SS_TABLE_CD
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS   
			WHERE 	GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
			UNION ALL
			SELECT  EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID AS BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,'EXT/SUP' AS SS_TABLE_CD
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS   
			/* Added as part SJPROD Sunset */
			UNION ALL
			SELECT 	BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, GLOBAL_NAME,'INT/EXT' SS_TABLE_CD 
			FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_CE_BANK_ACCOUNTS
			
			
		  ) STMOABA,
          $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE	 NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOABA.GLOBAL_NAME
) SMOABA,
(
	SELECT COALESCE(MAX (AP_BANK_ACCOUNT_KEY) , 0) MAX_VAL
	FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_BANK_ACCOUNT) SMABA
	WHERE  NOT EXISTS (   
						SELECT	 1 
						FROM	 $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_AP_BANK_ACCOUNT SABA
						WHERE  SABA.SK_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
						AND SABA.SS_CD = SMOABA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
						AND SABA.SS_TABLE_CD=SMOABA.SS_TABLE_CD
    			     )

SELECT  
	BATCH_ID,
	ACCOUNT_TYPE,
	BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
	BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
	COALESCE(SMOABA.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
	BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
	COALESCE(BANK_BRANCH_ID, -995) AS BANK_BRANCH_ID,
	GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	GLOBAL_NAME,
	CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	SS_TABLE_CD
FROM
(	/* Removed as part of sjprod retirement 
	 SELECT      
		BATCH_ID,
		ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
		BANK_BRANCH_ID,
		GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		'INT/EXT' AS SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS_ALL 
	WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	UNION ALL
	*/
	
	SELECT 
		BATCH_ID,
		ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
		BANK_BRANCH_ID,
		GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		'INTERNAL' AS SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM  $$STGDB.ST_MF_CE_BANK_ACCOUNTS 
	WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		BATCH_ID,
		CASE WHEN BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE ='BANK' THEN 'EXTERNAL'
			WHEN COALESCE(BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')<>'BANK' THEN 'SUPPLIER'
		END ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID AS BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
		COALESCE(BRANCH_ID,-999) AS BANK_BRANCH_ID,
		GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		'EXT/SUP' AS SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS   
	WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
		UNION ALL
	SELECT 
		BATCH_ID,
		CASE WHEN BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE ='BANK' THEN 'EXTERNAL'
			WHEN COALESCE(BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')<>'BANK' THEN 'SUPPLIER'
		END ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID AS BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
		COALESCE(BRANCH_ID,-999) AS BANK_BRANCH_ID,
		LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		'EXT/SUP' AS SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM 	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS   
	/*
	Bedrock2.0 change - removed OM flow
	UNION ALL 
	SELECT    
		BATCH_ID,				  
		ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
		BANK_BRANCH_ID,
		GES_UPDATE_DATE,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		'INT/EXT' AS SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_AP_BANK_ACCOUNTS
	*/
	/* Added as part of SJPROD Sunset */
	UNION ALL
		 SELECT      
		BATCH_ID,
		ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION AS ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME,
		BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,
		BANK_BRANCH_ID,
	    LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		CREATE_DATETIME,
		ACTION_CODE,
		'INT/EXT' AS SS_TABLE_CD
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_CE_BANK_ACCOUNTS
	
)SMOABA
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS (	SELECT 1 
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AP_BANK_BRANCH NABB,
				$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
				WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOABA.GLOBAL_NAME
				AND NABB.SK_BANK_BRANCH_ID_INT=SMOABA.BANK_BRANCH_ID
				AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NABB.SS_CD
			)
